description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu opened 11 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, numbered #107 through #117. He logged 25 hrs 36 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 30 mins. His tracked work was mostly in Python, Markdown, TypeScript, and SQL across 4 projects.
